Asgard Taping Set (TF-DVKN-31Q3) provides a comprehensive, high-performance solution for contractors focused on speed and precision in drywall finishing. This integrated system streamlines joint taping and corner finishing, ensuring consistent, paint-ready results across high-volume projects while minimizing operator fatigue.

Each component is engineered for durability in demanding job site environments. The set includes specialized tools for rapid tape application, efficient compound loading, and precise corner finishing, allowing for seamless transitions between tasks and improved overall workflow efficiency.

  • Precision Corner Finishing: Includes a 3-inch angle head and corner roller to ensure perfectly embedded tape and smooth, feathered edges.
  • Ergonomic Reach: Features two extendable handles to provide necessary leverage for high ceilings and varied wall configurations.

Name: Asgard Extendable Support Handle (XH-AD)
Description:
Asgard Extendable Support Handle (XH-AD) provides a versatile, contractor-grade solution for managing various drywall finishing tools. This telescopic handle is engineered to streamline workflows by allowing seamless transitions between corner rollers, angle boxes, nail spotters, and angle heads without the need for multiple handle systems. Its lightweight aluminum build ensures durability while reducing operator fatigue during extended use on ceilings and walls.

The handle features a specialized D-shaped fitting that locks securely into compatible tools, effectively eliminating rotation for precise, consistent results. With an ergonomic 1.25-inch diameter profile, it offers a comfortable grip that enhances control and minimizes hand strain. This tool is backed by a 5-year limited warranty and is fully supported by the TapeTech service network.

Name: Trowels
Description:
Premium Finishing Trowels

Introducing Columbia Trowels – engineered for professionals who demand superior flexibility, strength, and control on every job. Built with hardened stainless steel blades and ground edges with round corners, these trowels deliver smooth, consistent results across a wide range of drywall and finishing tasks.

From the ultra-responsive .3 Super-Flex to the robust .7 Pro-Flex Gold, Columbia offers a full line of trowels in sizes from 12″ to 18″, each designed for a specific level of flex and feel. The ultra-light aluminum high-alloy bar ensures exceptional balance, while the ergonomic, replaceable cork handle provides comfort during long hours of use.

100% made in Poland, Columbia Trowels are the professional’s choice for quality that lasts.

Available Products & Sizes:

  • .7 Pro-Flex Gold Trowel: 12″, 14″, 16″, 18″

    .7 Curved Gold Trowel: 12″, 14″, 16″

    .4 Curved Silver Trowel: 12″, 14″

    .3 Super-Flex Gold Trowel: 12″, 14″

    Key Features:

    • Ground Edges & Round Corners

      Extreme Quality Hardened Stainless Steel Blade

      Ultra-Light Aluminum High-Alloy Bar

      Ergonomic & Replaceable Cork Handle

      100% Made in Poland

      Individual Part Numbers:

Name: Columbia X Graco PowerFill 3.5 Loading Pump
Description:
Note: This product is not eligible for rebates, wholesale pricing, or discounts and is only available in North America.

Columbia Tools has partnered with Graco to bring you a Columbia Tools branded version of their already successful cordless powered loading pump for Columbia customers. The Columbia X Graco PowerFill is designed to fill all automatic taping and finishing tools with ease. The PowerFill system completely eliminates the need for manual pumping, allowing you to fill with just the push of a button.

Say Goodbye to Hand Pumping. The single-button pumping mechanism reduces fatigue and minimizes the risk of injury associated with manual pumps. With a flow rate of up to 3.5 gpm, you can fill tools lightning-fast, and with the capability to pump up to 55 gallons on a single battery charge, you’ll have all-day performance. Plus, it’s programmable to automatically refill tools with Precision Fill.

Bucket not included.

Features

  • SmartControl Pro with Programmable Precision Fill: Automatically refills your tools to your preset level.
  • One Button Pumping: Eliminates fatigue and potential injuries.
  • Hands-Free Continuous Run Mode: Ideal for transferring large quantities of material or self-cleaning.
  • Hi-Rise Fill Tube: Allows you to fill tools while standing upright, protecting your back and reducing fatigue. The tube rotates to position the outlet where needed, including above buckets to save space and contain drips.
  • Includes Filler Attachments: Designed for angle and flat boxes.

Powerstroke Pump

  • 4X Life vs. Manual Pumps: Built for exceptional durability.
  • Fastest Tool Fills: Pumps up to 3.5 gpm for efficient filling.
  • Maintenance Free: Tool-less access for easy cleaning of the pump cylinder, inlet, and filter.

ProConnect Pump and Removable Powerhead

  • No-Tools Pump and Powerhead Removal: Easily detach the powerhead for storage and quick cleaning.

Powered by DEWALT®

  • Compatible with any 20V MAX Lithium-Ion DEWALT Battery: Pumps up to 55 gallons per charge for reliable all-day use.

Adjustable Bucket Stabilizer

  • No-Tools Adjustment: Fits most buckets and containers.
  • Oversized Foot Bracket and Stabilizer Arm: Keeps the pump secure and stable.
  • Convertible Outlet: Change from right to left-sided pump outlet in minutes

Specifications

  • Version: 26B418
  • Max GPM (lpm): 3.5 (13.2)
  • Weight Lbs (Kg): 17 (7.7)
  • Pump: PowerStroke
  • Power/Battery: (1) DEWALT 20V MAX* COMPACT 2.0 ah Lithium-Ion Batteries and (1) Charger
  • Pump Outlet: Hi-Rise Fill Tube w/Box Filler
  • Precision Fill: Yes
  • Inlet Filter: Tool-less, 10 Mesh (1)
  • Adjustable Flow: Yes
  • Fits Container: Adjustable up to 5 (7-15″ Bucket Height Range)

Individual Part Numbers:

CPFP – Columbia PowerFill Pump (comes with box filler)

CPFGN – Columbia PowerFill Gooseneck (sold seperately)

Name: Fat Boy Smoothing Blades
Description:
Fat Boy Smoothing Blades

Available Now

Columbia is proud to launch the Fat Boy Smoothing Blades—built for comfort, precision, and performance.

With a lightweight, rubberized ergonomic grip to reduce slipping, the Fat Boy delivers smooth, even finishes with control. Its replaceable stainless steel blade offers long-term durability, while the new Fat Boy Smoothing Blade Claw expands your finishing options.

Two new Fiberglass Telescopic Extension Poles debut alongside the blades. Their snap lock system connects seamlessly with the Fat Boy Adapter and also works with our 2K Handle Mud Rollers, giving unmatched versatility.

When used by Hand or handles—the Fat Boy brings efficiency and comfort to every pass.

Key Features:

  • Replaceable Stainless Blade: Long-lasting and ultra-durable.

    Lightweight & Ergonomic Grip: Designed for comfort, control, and less fatigue.

Name: Columbia Predator Carbon Fiber Automatic Taper
Description:
The Predator is the world’s first Carbon Fiber Taper and the benefits that come with this are endless. The Columbia Taper is a precision built tool that has been perfected over 38 years, but now it is also significantly lighter than all other tapers on the market and dent proof. This tool will tape flats and angles effortlessly year after year. From less drag in the corners to our easy to remove cap for cleaning, this tool will not let you down. Stainless steel side plates and cable drum and creaser arms offer a lifetime of corrosion resistance. The Patent Pending Pump Action cutting sleeve gives the operator a smoother glide over teflon bearings, superb grip and the pull ring is great for higher ceilings. The Predator maintains it’s stable temperature and remains warm to the touch. Every taper comes standard with an adjustable brake and quick release for tape changing. The Titanium pull rod is just another detail that adds style and edge to this innovative, unique taper. If you are serious about taping and care how a taper feels and performs this is the one for you.

FEATURES:

  • Handmade from Carbon Fiber and steel components
  • Titanium pull rod
  • Adjustable Brake
  • Quick release for tape changing
  • Reduced Drag system for corners
  • Stainless steel side plates, creaser arms and cable drum
  • Quick release cap
  • NEW Very smooth Patent Pending Pump Action cutting system with a roller chain
  • 53″ in length
  • Machined in our state of the art factory in Canada

Description: Columbia Taping Tools introduces the world's first Mini Carbon Fiber Taper, The Predator "Sawed Off" Mini. Unlike other taper bodies made mostly from aluminum, the Predator's Carbon Fiber construction, makes this precision-engineered tool 20% lighter and more durable then any standard mini taper on the market. Another unique benefit of this Dent Proof construction, is that Carbon Fiber maintains temperature stability, meaning this taper will remain warm to the touch. The 6 wheel cutting sleeve has been updated in favor of teflon sliders which gives the operator a smoother glide and better grip. Now, changing the sliders out is simple field maintenance and can be installed with a standard screwdriver in minutes as opposed to half an hour or more. The pull ring is ideal for higher ceilings. The Predator will tape flats and angles effortlessly with less drag in the corners. The quick release cap makes cleaning a breeze and the stainless steel side plates, cable drum, and creaser arms offer a lifetime of corrosion resistance. With style, functionality, and durability the Predator from Columbia takes the -Evolution of Taping- to a whole new level. Predator "Sawed Off" Mini is perfect for taping drywall in small rooms and closets when a full size taper is too cumbersome.
Short description: Columbia Taping Tools introduces the world's first Mini Carbon Fiber Taper, The Predator "Sawed Off" Mini.
Categories: Drywall Finishing Tools > Columbia Taping Tools > Automatic Tapers

It is our solution to Columbia Customers looking for a lighter/more affordable option. Additionally, they offer a competitive price point costing around 40% less allowing you to choose the right tool for your needs without compromise.

Whether you prefer manual use or want to enhance your reach with a Sabre Extension pole (using the Sabre Claw adapter), the Sabre Smoothing Blades deliver perfectly even usage and smoothness across the entire length of the blade. Their ergonomic and lightweight design ensures that you can work efficiently without fatigue.

Name: TapeTech EasyClean® Carbon Fiber Automatic Taper
Description:
The EasyClean® Carbon Fiber Automatic Taper is the world’s lightest automatic taper. Weighing only 5.65 pounds, the 07TT-C is up to 20% lighter than other tapers on the market. This significant weight reduction helps to decrease worker fatigue, making it easier to handle and use for extended periods. Innovative Carbon Fiber Design The EasyClean® Carbon Fiber Automatic Taper is constructed from carbon fiber, which makes both the main tube and the control tube incredibly durable. Carbon fiber is a material that won’t dent and remains temperature-neutral. This means no more dealing with cold tubes in winter or hot tubes in summer, providing consistent performance year-round. Advanced Features for Efficiency The 07TT-C comes with TapeTech’s EasyClean® cover plate and tube protector design. This feature simplifies the cleaning process, saving you time and effort. Additionally, the taper includes an adjustable brake, allowing you to control the flow of the joint compound easily. The EasyClean® Carbon Fiber Automatic Taper is known for having the smoothest action in the industry, ensuring a seamless application every time. Versatile Application The EasyClean® Carbon Fiber Automatic Taper is designed to apply joint tape and compound simultaneously. It works on both flat joints on walls and ceilings as well as internal corners. This versatility makes it an essential tool for any drywall finishing job, big or small. Benefits of the EasyClean® Carbon Fiber Automatic Taper - Lightweight: At 5.65 pounds, it reduces worker fatigue. - Durable: Made from carbon fiber, it won’t dent and is temperature-neutral. - Easy to Clean: Features TapeTech’s EasyClean® cover plate and tube protector design. - Adjustable Brake: Allows for easy control of joint compound flow. - Smooth Action: Known for the smoothest action in the industry. - Versatile: Applies joint tape and compound to both flat joints and internal corners. Improve Your Work Quality Using the EasyClean® Carbon Fiber Automatic Taper helps improve the quality and efficiency of your drywall finishing work. Its lightweight design and smooth operation allow for precise application, reducing the need for touch-ups and rework. This tool is ideal for professionals who demand the best in performance and reliability. Name: TapeTech 2" Corner Finisher
Description: The TapeTech Corner Finisher is used to perfectly feather both joint compound edges of internal corners in one pass. The Corner Finishers can be used for wall-to-wall internal corners or wall-to-ceiling corners. Corner Finishers, also referred to as Angle Finishers, are attached to a corner applicator (CA07TT or CA08TT) or the 14TT MudRunner® to quickly and professionally finish internal drywall corners. The 40XTT 2" Corner Finisher is often used with the FHTT or XHTT handle as part of the taping process to embed tape into the corners and remove excess joint compound after the 15TTE Corner Roller. Use with the FHTT Fiberglass Handle or the XHTT Extension Handle – not included. Wipes down excess mud in internal corners Embeds inside corner tape on walls and ceilings

Name: TapeTech 2-1/2" Corner Finisher
Description:
TapeTech Corner Finisher The TapeTech Corner Finisher is designed to perfectly feather both joint compound edges of internal corners in one pass. It can be used for wall-to-wall internal corners or wall-to-ceiling corners. This tool, also known as an Angle Finisher, attaches to a corner applicator (CA07TT or CA08TT) or the 14TT MudRunner®. It helps you quickly and professionally finish internal drywall corners. Perfect for Internal Corners The TapeTech Corner Finisher is ideal for wiping down excess mud in internal corners. It embeds inside corner tape on walls and ceilings, making the finishing process smooth and efficient. Whether you are working on small residential projects or large commercial sites, this tool ensures a high-quality finish every time. Versatility and Ease of Use Corner Finishers are versatile and can be used in various applications. They are perfect for both wall-to-wall and wall-to-ceiling corners. These tools are spring-loaded to help compensate for slightly imperfect corners. This feature ensures that you get a consistent finish even on uneven surfaces.

Name: TapeTech 3" EasyRoll® Adjustable Corner Finisher
Description: The TapeTech EasyRoll® Adjustable Corner Finisher is used to perfectly feather both joint compound edges of internal corners in one pass. The Corner Finishers can be used for wall-to-wall internal corners or wall-to-ceiling corners. The “adjustable” feature of this tool refers to the ability to control the amount of spring pressure by engaging or disengaging one set of tension springs on the back of the corner finisher. Corner Finishers, also referred to as Angle Finishers or Angle Heads, are attached to a corner applicator (CA07TT or CA08TT) or the 14TT MudRunner® to quickly and professionally finish internal drywall corners. EasyRoll® Adjustable Corner Finishers have wheels to provide the smoothest action on the wall and are spring loaded to help compensate for slightly imperfect corners. Use with the FHTT Fiberglass Handle or the XHTT Extension Handle – not included. Wipes down excess mud in internal corners Finishes inside corners of walls and ceilings

Name: TapeTech Automatic Taper Extension
Description:
The TapeTech Automatic Taper Extension adds 30" or 76 cm to your 07TT EasyClean® Automatic Taper. This extension allows you to reach joints up to 11.8 feet or 3.6 meters high without needing an extra-long taper. *Note - This product is NOT compatible with the 07TT-C EasyClean® Carbon Fiber Automatic Taper. Increased Reach The TapeTech Automatic Taper Extension increases the length of your taper by nearly 60%. This added reach makes it easier to work on high joints, reducing the need for ladders or scaffolding. Easy Connection The extension connects quickly and easily to the automatic taper. No tools are required, making it convenient for any job site. Independent Controls The extension includes its own control tube for advancing and cutting the paper tape. Additionally, it has an independent creaser wheel control lever, allowing for precise and efficient operation.

Name: TapeTech 4" Compound Roller Frame
Description: TapeTech 4" Roller Cage CCAGE04 TapeTech drywall joint compound rollers are ideal for applying large amounts of drywall compound on walls and ceilings for finishing large patches and butt joints, or skimming entire walls, ceilings and rooms. They are a great alternative to breaking out a sprayer or trying to apply the compound with knives or trowels. Simply apply the joint compound with the TapeTech premium drywall joint compound roller and then skim the area with a TapeTech premium finishing knife for an amazing finish. TapeTech compound rollers are designed for use with TapeTech roller frames. The shafts of our dedicated roller frames are a full 5/16” thick, providing the strongest frame in the industry – a must for this heavy-duty application. The roller and roller frames quickly and easily attach to our TapeTech model CROLLHAN2 extendable support handle (44” – 79”) to make quick work of most walls and ceilings without the need for stilts or scaffolds. Key Features: Robust Design: Features a full 5/16” thick frame design – stronger than smaller ¼” thick frames – and the most robust joint compound roller frame on the market. Comfortable Handle: The TapeTech Roller frames feature a comfortable, two-component over molded handle that provides comfortable handling and positive grip, even when wet. Highest Quality: TapeTech premium drywall joint compound rollers are manufactured in Europe exclusively for TapeTech, using the highest quality reticulated polypropylene nap for great results and long life. Highest Capacity: When matched with a TapeTech premium drywall joint compound roller, applies nearly 50% more compound to the surface between fills compared to other high nap rollers and frames. Highest Coverage: The unique design and manufacturing of TapeTech premium joint compound rollers releases more compound from the nap and onto the surface, providing the highest coverage rate per roller load. Extended Reach: Easily attaches to TapeTech CROLLHAN2 extendable handle to reach most common walls and ceilings without stilts or scaffolds. With super secure attachment and lightweight but robust construction, you’ll quickly knock out any wall coverage or skimming job. Ideal for Skimming: The TapeTech premium drywall joint compound rollers are ideal for quickly applying large amounts of compound over patches, butt joints or entire surfaces. The perfect set up for skimming with TapeTech premium finishing knives. Available in 4 sizes: TapeTech premium joint compound roller frames are available in 4-inch, 9-inch and 12-inch sizes plus an integrated 2-inch model that includes the roller and frame together.

Name: TapeTech EasyClean® Finishing Box
Description: The TapeTech EasyClean® Finishing Box automatically dispenses the proper amount of joint compound and feathers the edges of butt joints and flat joints in one pass. The EasyClean Finishing Box helps produce professional results every time. The adjustable crown setting dial allows the user to easily adjust the amount of joint compound applied over the tape on the drywall joint. This is very helpful when progressing from the first finishing application to the second or third application. The pivoting axle helps to compensate when the drywall or sheetrock on one side of the joint is higher than the other side of the joint.

Name: TapeTech Fiberglass Handle
Description: TapeTech is the first company to introduce an interchangeable handle system that allows one support handle to be used with every tool. Whether you use standard, fixed length fiberglass handles or aluminum extension support handles, you’ll need just one base handle. The base handle for the fiberglass system is model FHTT. The base handle for the extension handle system is model XHTT. The base handle fits the corner roller, corner applicator and nail spotter without any adapters. The heavy duty, easy-to-change adapter (CFA-TT) connect the handles to the corner finishers. And the optimal diameter makes TapeTech handles the most ergonomic in the industry. Both base handles feature a D-shaped fitting that securely positions the handle in the Corner Applicator and positively prevents the tool from rotating during use. Note: If you use your current Nail Spotters with the handle system you will need to mount the handle in the back holes of the tabs on the Nail Spotter.

Name: TapeTech MAXXBOX®
Description: Introducing the first high capacity finishing boxes designed to hold the right amount of joint compound when you really need it – on the first or second coat when you’re filling the joint – without the unnecessary weight you don’t need on the finish coat. The TapeTech MAXXBOX® Finishing Boxes are designed with the optimum capacity to weight ratio. This means that you get more “usable” joint compound – the amount that you can actually get out of the finishing box and onto the wall – when you actually need it, like on the first coat. The TapeTech 7” MAXXBOX® finishing box delivers 94% more usable joint compound than the standard EasyClean® finishing box (model EZ07TT) and up to 68% more usable capacity than competitive high capacity finishing boxes. Step up to the boxes designed to hold and deliver the right amount. Every time. Every box. MAXXBOX®. Applies first coat of joint compound to embed tape at butt joints and flat joints on walls and ceilings Finishes butt joints and flat joints on walls and ceilings Feathers edges of butt joints and flat joints

Name: TapeTech EasyClean® Nail Spotter
Description:
TapeTech EasyClean® Nail Spotter The TapeTech EasyClean® Nail Spotter is a must-have tool for drywall finishing. It fills the depressions left by nail or screw heads during drywall installation. The Nail Spotter's easy clean box design helps fill these depressions and remove extra compound at the same time. This makes the drywall finishing process faster and easier. Key Features A key feature of the TapeTech EasyClean® Nail Spotter is its hardened steel skid plate. This plate lets the Nail Spotter move smoothly along the wall. It also protects the stainless steel blade from damage caused by nail or screw heads that are not fully set below the drywall surface. Consequently, this feature helps the tool last longer, making it a smart buy for drywall professionals. Handle Compatibility The Nail Spotter works with the XHTT Extension handle and the FHTT fiberglass handle. These handles are sold separately. They give extra reach and control, making it easier to work on high or hard-to-reach areas without ladders or scaffolding. The extension handle is great for big projects, while the fiberglass handle is a light yet strong option. User-Friendly Design The TapeTech EasyClean® Nail Spotter is designed to be easy to use. The easy clean box design makes cleaning simple and quick. This is very useful for busy contractors who need to keep their tools in good condition without losing time. Benefits: - Efficient Drywall Finishing: Fills depressions caused by nail or screw heads and removes extra joint compound in one pass. - Durable Construction: Hardened steel skid plate protects the blade, ensuring long-lasting performance. - Enhanced Reach and Control:

Name: TapeTech QuickBox® QSX
Description: The QuickBox® QSX from TapeTech is the first finishing box specifically designed to be used with fast-setting joint compounds. The 6 ½” QuickBox® QSX is the perfect tool for contractors who use fast-setting joint compound for the first coat over the paper or fiberglass joint tape. Constructed from advanced space age materials, fast-setting joint compound is easily removed from the finishing box, even hours or days later. The compound literally falls out of the QuickBox® QSX with a few light taps. The glass-filled polypropylene shell provides a slick surface with maximum strength and durability. The optimized blade design matches the blade with the application, eliminating the need to make adjustments or change crown settings. And it takes just a few seconds to change the long-lasting blades. QuickBox® QSX works with all finishing box handles, including the Wizard®. Now you can combine the speed and consistency of finishing boxes with the speed of fast-setting joint compound!

Name: TapeTech Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper
Description: The Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper: Revolutionizing Drywall Finishing   The Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper is an innovative tool designed to streamline the drywall finishing process. When connected to the Continuous Flow Pump (CTPMP), this advanced taper simultaneously applies drywall tape and the correct amount of joint compound to all types of drywall joints. This combination of efficiency and precision makes it an indispensable tool for professional contractors. Key Features of the Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper   One of the standout features of the Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper is its inline handle with dual trigger, which enhances control and ease of use. Weighing just 7 pounds, it is lightweight enough to be maneuvered effortlessly, reducing user fatigue during extended use. The taper's design includes a creaser wheel, which ensures a perfect finish every time by embedding the tape securely into the joint compound.   Additionally, the tool-less hose connection makes setup and disassembly quick and straightforward, saving valuable time on the job. For added convenience, the Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper can be paired with the CTVLV for wireless, radio frequency (RF) control, allowing the user to manage the flow of joint compound from the pump to the taper with ease.   Versatile Application   The Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper is versatile, capable of handling various types of drywall joints with precision: - Butt Joints and Flat Joints: Whether you're working on walls or ceilings, the taper applies the joint compound and tape seamlessly, ensuring a smooth and professional finish. - Internal Corners: The taper is designed to efficiently handle internal corners on walls and ceilings, making it a comprehensive solution for all your drywall finishing needs. Advantages of Using the Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper   - Increased Efficiency: By applying both tape and joint compound simultaneously, the Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper significantly speeds up the drywall finishing process. This increased efficiency allows for more work to be completed in less time, enhancing productivity. - Consistent Quality: The precise application of joint compound and tape ensures a consistent, high-quality finish on every joint. This consistency reduces the need for additional touch-ups and sanding, saving both time and materials. - Ease of Use: The lightweight design and ergonomic inline handle make the Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper easy to maneuver, even in tight spaces. The dual trigger system provides greater control over the application process, resulting in a more accurate and professional finish. - Quick Setup: The tool-less hose connection and wireless RF control simplify the setup and operation of the taper, allowing users to focus on the task at hand without worrying about complex equipment adjustments.   Conclusion   The Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper is an essential tool for anyone involved in drywall installation and finishing. Its advanced features, combined with its lightweight and ergonomic design, make it a valuable addition to any toolkit. Whether you are working on large-scale projects or smaller tasks, the Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper will help you achieve a flawless finish with minimal effort. Embrace the future of drywall finishing with the Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper and experience unparalleled efficiency and quality in your work.

Whether you use standard, fixed length fiberglass handles or aluminum extension support handles, you’ll need just one base handle. The base handle for the fiberglass system is model FHTT. The base handle for the extension handle system is model XHTT. The base handle fits the corner roller, corner applicator and nail spotter without any adapters. The heavy duty, easy-to-change adapter (CFA-TT) connect the handles to the corner finishers. And the optimal diameter makes TapeTech handles the most ergonomic in the industry. Both base handles feature a D-shaped fitting that securely positions the handle in the Corner Applicator and positively prevents the tool from rotating during use. Note: If you use your current Nail Spotters with the handle system you will need to mount the handle in the back holes of the tabs on the Nail Spotter.

Name: TapeTech Corner Flushers
Description: TapeTech Corner Flushers make quick work of wiping or finishing inside corners. Direct flushers are used to apply joint compound to internal corners. Indirect flushers simply smooth compound that has been applied by another tool. TapeTech flushers work as both a direct and indirect flusher. That means you don’t have to decide which model to get, only which sizes fit your needs.

Name: TapeTech Sanding Sponges
Description: Introducing a range of premium sanding solutions designed to help professional finishers achieve impeccable results. TapeTech Premium Sanding Sponges set the Gold Standard with their optimal removal rates and superior finish. Featuring an innovative anti-clog design, these sponges are perfect for both wet and dry applications. The durable foam ensures a comfortable grip and excellent flexibility, while the brown fused aluminum oxide offers extended sanding life without flaking or breaking. These reusable sponges can be washed and reused, providing both quality and savings. Experience the efficiency and reliability of TapeTech’s top-tier sanding solutions and elevate your finishing work to a new level of excellence. Content
